temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man's face in a dimly lit, dark environment. He has short, dark hair and a concerned expression. He holds a phone to his ear with his right hand, his mouth slightly open as if speaking. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio begins with a man speaking into a phone in a calm, questioning tone, saying, "喂?" (Hello?). His voice is then cut off by another man shouting urgently and aggressively, "把货扔海里，快点!" (Throw the goods in the sea, quick!). The camera cuts to a wide shot of a dark, wet outdoor area at night. A bright, warm light from a streetlamp illuminates the foreground, creating a lens flare. In the background, the blurry lights of a city or town are visible across a body of water. A chain-link fence runs along the right side of the frame. The white Chinese characters remain in the upper left corner. A loud, sharp, and impactful sound, like a gunshot or a powerful thud, rings out, creating a moment of intense action. The scene shifts to a medium shot of two men standing close together at night. The man in the foreground, wearing a dark shirt, looks off-camera with a serious expression. The man behind him is slightly out of focus. The background is dark with out-of-focus lights. The white Chinese characters are still present in the upper left. The same man then yells again with extreme urgency and command, "阿强，把货扔海里!" (A Qiang, throw the goods in the sea!). The final shot is a full-body view of a man standing alone in near-total darkness. He is wearing a dark jacket and is illuminated from the side by a single light source, casting long shadows. He gestures with his hands as if in the middle of an intense action or argument. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible in the upper left corner.
